title: POST /books — Create a new book
evidence: main.go:141-165 createBook handler validates title/author and inserts into books table

title: GET /books — List all books with author filter
evidence: main.go:111-139 listBooks handler supports ?author= query param, TestListAndFilterBooks passes

title: GET /books/{id} — Get single book by ID
PUT /books/{id} — Update a book
evidence: main.go:182-213 updateBook handler with validation, TestUpdateBook passes

title: Use specified language (Go) and framework
evidence: stack.json language=go, code uses net/http standard library

title: Store data in SQLite database
evidence: main.go:4,13 uses modernc.org/sqlite, initDB creates books table

title: Return JSON with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: main.go:59-67 writeJSON/writeError helpers, all handlers use correct status codes (201 for create, 204 for delete, etc.)

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: main.go:147-154 createBook and main.go:196-203 updateBook validate non-empty title/author, TestCreateBookValidation passes

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md present with setup, build, test, and endpoint documentation

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: 7 tests present: TestHealth, TestCreateAndGetBook, TestCreateBookValidation, TestListAndFilterBooks, TestUpdateBook, TestDeleteBook, TestNotFound
